scripts.websearch:smoke: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-strategies run run:websearch-smoke --
scripts.test:linkage: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-strategies run test:linkage
scripts.test:screener: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-strategies run test:screener
scripts.reports-site:emit: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-strategies run run:reports-site-emit
scripts.reports-site:clear: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-strategies run run:reports-site-clear --
scripts.sync:reports-to-app: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-strategies run run:reports-site-sync
scripts.sync:reports-to-docs: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @trade-signal/research-strategies run run:reports-site-sync -- --legacy-docs
